Center: Centre for Photonuclear Experiments Data, Moscow State University, Russia
ref: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.112, p.054603 (2025)
title: Unconventional 67Cu production using high-energy bremsstrahlung and cross section evaluation.

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.112, p.054603 (2025)

x4codes.hlp: Univ. of York, York, United Kingdom

x4freetext: 855 MeV electron beam of the Mainzer
The reaction yields were measured for each
radionuclide studied and used for determination
photon spectrum normalization, and cross section.
All uncertainties were treated as independent and
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
